## Validation

- [ ] `npm run test`
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `docker compose config --quiet`
- [ ] `POSTGRES_PASSWORD=release-check docker compose -f docker-compose.image.yml config --quiet`
- [ ] Smoke test run when auth, upload, reports, People, settings, or deployment behavior changes
